name: Milford,Baswich,Weeping Cross
description:
The area is located just outside Stafford town centre with extensive bus routes and easy access to Cannock Chase and the Shugborough estate. It is home to a range of local schools and shopping areas and public amenities and has seen the development of new housing of late.

The area is supported by a large number of active community associations and the largest Neighbourhood Watch contingent in Stafford.
